message:
feat(host): add progress tracking controller with throttling and aggregation (64 tests)

Implements long-running operation progress tracking with ProgressUpdate
(current/total, rate, ETA, unit), PhaseTransition for multi-step ops,
configurable throttle interval, notification recording, and aggregated
progress across batch operations. ProgressController tracks multiple
operations independently with stop_tracking returning full notification
history.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
